# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notify

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited]

jobs:
  build-and-notify:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
      pull-requests: read
    env:
      PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
      PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
      HEAD_REF: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
      HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
      BASE_REF: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR branch
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up build metadata
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo "title<<EOF"
            echo "$PR_TITLE"
            echo "EOF"
            echo "body<<EOF"
            echo "$PR_BODY"
            echo "EOF"
            echo "short_sha=${HEAD_SHA::7}"
            echo "deploy_message=Deploy PR #$PR_NUMBER: $PR_TITLE"
            echo "notification_title=PR #$PR_NUMBER Build"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Running build for PR #$PR_NUMBER"
          echo "Title: $PR_TITLE"
          echo "Description:"
          echo "$PR_BODY"
          echo "Add your real build commands here"

      - name: Create tracking commit with PR title
        shell: bash
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git commit --allow-empty -m "build(pr #$PR_NUMBER): $PR_TITLE" -m "Source: $PR_URL" -m "$PR_BODY" || true

      - name: Build notification
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Notification title: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.notification_title }}"
          echo "Notification body:"
          echo "Feature: $PR_TITLE"
          echo "PR: #$PR_NUMBER"
          echo "URL: $PR_URL"
          echo "Base: $BASE_REF"
          echo "Head: $HEAD_REF"
          echo "Commit: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.short_sha }}"
          echo
          echo "Description:"
          echo "$PR_BODY"
          echo
          echo "Release notes key: $PR_TITLE"

      - name: Example Slack payload
        shell: bash
        run: |
          cat <<EOF
          {
            "text": "${{ steps.meta.outputs.deploy_message }}",
            "attachments": [
              {
                "title": "PR #$PR_NUMBER",
                "title_link": "$PR_URL",
                "fields": [
                  { "title": "Feature", "value": "$PR_TITLE", "short": false },
                  { "title": "Base", "value": "$BASE_REF", "short": true },
                  { "title": "Head", "value": "$HEAD_REF", "short": true },
                  { "title": "Commit", "value": "${{ steps.meta.outputs.short_sha }}", "short": true }
                ],
                "text": "$PR_BODY"
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF
